metadata.name: customer_support_bot
metadata.description: Automated customer support with FAQ lookup, ticket creation, and escalation routing

data.task: Classify the customer query into one of: FAQ, Bug Report, Feature Request, Account Issue, Billing, Other. Extract key entities and sentiment
Search the knowledge base for relevant FAQ entries, documentation, and past resolved tickets matching the classified intent
Compose a helpful response using the FAQ/docs results. If no confident answer, flag for escalation with reason. If bug report, draft a ticket JSON with title, description, severity, and labels
